title: Review: trailing-slash fix + skip_number_b validation
description: Review of: VAULT_ADDR trailing slash fix, skip_number_b digit validation after decimal and exponent, direct tests for skip_number_b via byte-level path
notes:
Confidence: 95% chance of no missed bugs. The trailing-slash fix is a 1-line change, well-tested. The skip_number_b fixes are 4-line changes with direct test coverage. No new API surface. No correctness issues found in this pass. Remaining uncertainty: integration test for trailing-slash uses URL-in-URL format in the URI query string, which works but is non-standard; a future URI parser change could break it.
Maintainer risk: LOW — changes are minimal, targeted, and fully tested.
